items.title: PARLIAMENT QUESTION: Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 to come into effect from April 1
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change PARLIAMENT QUESTION: Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 to come into effect from April 1 Posted On: 30 MAR 2026 1:37PM by PIB Delhi The Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, Government of India notified the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 on 27th January 2026 in the Official Gazette, superseding the Solid Waste …
